structural_claim: Gauge symmetries dictate the form of fundamental interactions, with forces arising from the requirement of local symmetry invariance

supporting_results.structural_conclusion: Local gauge invariance mathematically determines the structure of force-mediating fields

supporting_results.result_name: Discovery of the W and Z bosons
supporting_results.structural_conclusion: Experimental confirmation that weak forces are mediated by gauge bosons arising from local symmetry
Electromagnetic and weak forces unified through gauge principle based on SU(2)×U(1) symmetry
